title: Flower Crowns
description: Adds 20 colorful flower crowns to the game.
body:
# Flower Crowns **Hi!** If you've ever wanted to have flowers in your hair, this set is definitely for you! By renaming your helmet, you can wear your favorite flowers as a subtle flower crown.
In this set you will find 20 different designs with matching icons! **This pack requires [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home 'Optifine') to work!**
How to rename helmets to get flower crowns! Rename Netherite/Diamond/Golden/Iron/Chainmail Helmet as: - Cornflower Crown - Blue Orchid Crown - Allium Crown - Pink Tulip Crown - White Tulip Crown - Lily of the Valley Crown - Oxeye Daisy Crown - Dandelion Crown - Orange Tulip Crown - Red Tulip Crown - Poppy Crown - Wither Rose Crown - Rose Bush Crown - Lilac Crown - Peony Crown - Sunflower Crown - Azalea Crown - Buttercup Crown - Pink Daisy Crown to get your favorite flower!
All crowns made of flowers!
**Hope you like it!**
